name: Baked Plantain Load
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the plantains and cut them into small chunks. Place in a large deep mixing bowl.
2. Mash the plantains with your fingers or an electric blender until they form a thick paste. If using a blender, add 30-60 milliliters of water for smoother blending.
3. Add the chili sambal, rice flour, and salt to the mashed plantains. Mix well.
4. Heat the corn oil in a frying pan over low heat and add the turmeric. Stir until mixed, then remove from heat.
5. Blend the turmeric mixture into the plantain mixture so that it is thin yet soft enough to pour. Adjust consistency by adding rice flour if too stiff or water if too soft.
6. Grease a loaf tin and pour in the plantain mixture. Bake at 150-180°C for medium to low heat for 1 hour, or until cooked and firm.
7. Allow to stand for approximately 5-10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack. Slice and serve with salted peanuts or as an accompaniment to spicy dishes.
